calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Off Calendar

Declaration Of Ka Ty M. Young In Support Of Plaintiffs Application For Court Rudgment (Declarations)
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept: 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Bailiff: Deputy Jones; Reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:34:08 a.m., and concluding at 9:45:09 a.m.(D505)

This matter came on calendar this day for request of default judgment against Defendant Stephen Powell.

Appearances:
Katy M. Young, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference representing Plaintiff AD Astraw Law Group LLC.
Geoffrey Murry, sworn to testify via Zoom Video Conference.

The Court has reviewed the additional filings Plaintiff has filed and provided.

The Court examines the witness.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendants:

Damages $69,510.11
Pre-Judgment Interest at 0% $0
Costs $1,295.15
Attorney's Fees $2,155.50
Other $0
Total Judgment $72,961.36

Proposed judgment as modified signed and executed this day.

Declaration Of Ka Ty M. Young In Support Of Plaintiffs Application For Court Rudgment (Declarations)
Off Calendar Mar-14-2025 Continued To Apr-30-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for a request for default judgment against Defendant Ouahiba Kohourchech aka Wahiba Kharchich.

Dept.505: Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 10:49:20 a.m., and concluding at a.m. (D505)

Katy M Young, Esq. representing Plaintiff Ad Astra Law Group via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Stephen Powell not appearing.

The Court discusses with counsel statute fo limitations. Counsel offers proof as to the issue.

Plaintiff is to submit supplemental declaration on the services rendered and dates and to provide courtesy copies to the court. A witness is required to appear at the next hearing date.

Good cause appearing the Court continues the matter to April 30, 2025 at 9:00 a.m in Dept.505.
